title: State-Level Karate Championship
description: Our students secured top positions at the State-Level Karate Championship, bringing pride and glory to the school.

title: District-Level Karate Medals
description: Multiple students won medals at district-level karate competitions, reflecting years of dedicated practice and coaching.

title: District Yoga Championship
description: Our school team clinched top positions at the District-Level Yoga Championship, showcasing excellence in wellness and discipline.

title: World Yoga Day Performance
description: Students performed beautifully at the World Yoga Day celebrations, representing the school on an international observance stage.

title: World Environment Day Initiative
description: Students created inspiring recyclable art projects on World Environment Day, promoting sustainability and environmental responsibility.
